llvm_ir_output_pattern:
`!air.version = !{i32 Major, i32 Minor, i32 Patch}`
`!air.language_version = !{!"Metal", i32 M, i32 N, i32 P}`
cleanroom_implementation_notes: Emitted inside `CodeGenModule::EmitModuleMetadata()`. Computed from `-std=` and `-target` triple via `legacy_metal_support_map.csv`

target_ast_or_builtin: Kernel Entry Function Signature & Calling Conv
llvm_ir_output_pattern: `define void @my_kernel(...) #0 section "__TEXT,__text,regular,pure_instructions"` with calling convention `fastcc` or `air_kernel`
apple_ir_observed: define void @k(ptr addrspace(1) noundef %0, i32 noundef %1) local_unnamed_addr #0
cleanroom_implementation_notes: Entry functions return `void` and carry `!air.kernel` metadata node referencing the function definition

llvm_ir_output_pattern: `!air.kernel = !{!{void (@my_kernel)* @my_kernel, !1, !2, ...}}` where !1, !2 encode argument type name, address space, access, and binding index (`buffer(0)`)
cleanroom_implementation_notes: Detailed parameter metadata exact layout (`i32 arg_kind`, `name`, `type_name`, `binding_type`, `slot_index`, `align`, `size`)

llvm_ir_output_pattern: `call <N x float> @air.<verb>.<subject>(<N x float> %arg, ...)` with `tail call fast` attributes when fast_math is active
cleanroom_implementation_notes: Directly driven by our `builtin_to_air_map.v2.csv` (686 rows) lookup during `CodeGenFunction::EmitBuiltinExpr()`

llvm_ir_output_pattern: `addrspacecast (T addrspace(A)* %ptr to T addrspace(B)*)` or `bitcast` for identical layout spaces
cleanroom_implementation_notes: Emitted for `ImplicitCastExpr` when casting between `device`/`constant`/`threadgroup` pointers and generic pointers (`addrspace(0)`)

llvm_ir_output_pattern: `%struct._texture_2d_t = type opaque` / `%struct._sampler_t = type opaque` / `%struct._command_buffer_t = type opaque`
cleanroom_implementation_notes: All 35 opaque `_t` types (`type_layout_map.csv`) emitted as `type opaque` in LLVM module global declarations
